pages.title: Gerard McCaul — Theoretical Physicist
pages.description: Personal website of Dr. Gerard McCaul, theoretical physicist. Research in quantum control, open quantum systems, reservoir computing, and superoscillations.
pages.og_description: Theoretical physicist. Research in quantum control, open quantum systems, reservoir computing, and superoscillations. 25+ publications including PRL.
pages.twitter_description: Theoretical physicist. Quantum control, open quantum systems, reservoir computing, superoscillations.
pages.head_extra:
<link rel="preload" href="/assets/css/style.css" as="style">
  <link rel="preload" href="/assets/img/me.jpg" as="image">

pages.body_scripts:
<script>
    fetch('https://littlelearningmachine.substack.com/api/v1/posts/?limit=1')
      .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
      .then(function (posts) {
        if (!posts || !posts.length) return;
        var p = posts[0];
        document.getElementById('home-latest-link').href = p.canonical_url;
        document.getElementById('home-latest-title').textContent = p.title;
        document.getElementById('home-latest-post').style.display = '';
      })
      .catch(function () { });
  </script>

pages.title: Physics — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Research, publications, and talks by Dr. Gerard McCaul. 25+ papers spanning quantum control, open quantum systems, superoscillations, reservoir computing, and Koopman mechanics.
pages.og_description: 25+ publications in PRL, PRB, PRA, Quantum and more. Research spanning quantum control, open quantum systems, superoscillations, and reservoir computing.
pages.twitter_description: 25+ publications in PRL, PRB, PRA, Quantum. Quantum control, superoscillations, reservoir computing.

pages.title: Talks — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Talks and presentations by Gerard McCaul, including seminars on dynamics, computation, and quantum structure.
pages.og_description: Talks and presentations by Gerard McCaul, including seminars on dynamics, computation, and quantum structure.
pages.twitter_description: Talks on dynamics, computation, quantum structure, and related physics.

pages.title: Music — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Original music by Gerard McCaul  -  songs written and recorded including New Devotion, Goodbye to New Orleans, and Somewhere Unknown.
pages.og_description: Original songs written and recorded by theoretical physicist Gerard McCaul.
pages.twitter_description: Original songs by Gerard McCaul  -  New Devotion, Goodbye to New Orleans, Somewhere Unknown.
pages.head_extra:
<style>
    .track-list {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: var(--space-xl);
    }

    .track-card {
      padding: var(--space-2xl);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-glass);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      transition: all var(--transition-base);
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .track-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--highlight-purple), var(--accent), var(--highlight-blue));
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    .track-card:hover {
      background: var(--bg-card-hover);
    }

    .track-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: var(--space-md);
      margin-bottom: var(--space-lg);
    }

    .track-number {
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--accent-dim);
      color: var(--accent);
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1rem;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .track-info h3 {
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      margin-bottom: 2px;
    }

    .track-info .track-meta {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
    }

    .track-card audio {
      width: 100%;
      height: 44px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      outline: none;
    }

    .disclaimer {
      margin-top: var(--space-3xl);
      padding: var(--space-xl);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-glass);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      text-align: center;
    }

    .disclaimer p {
      font-size: 0.825rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-style: italic;
    }
  </style>

pages.title: Writing — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Essays, prize-winning fiction, and creative writing by Dr. Gerard McCaul. FQxI 2nd place essay, Quantum-Steampunk runner-up, gonzo memoir, and a Substack on physics and fatherhood.
pages.og_description: Prize-winning essays, gonzo memoir, and a Substack on physics and fatherhood by theoretical physicist Gerard McCaul.
pages.twitter_description: FQxI 2nd place essay, Quantum-Steampunk runner-up, and scraps from a physicist with authorial delusions.
pages.head_extra:
<style>
    .scrap-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr));
      gap: var(--space-xl);
    }

    .scrap-card {
      padding: var(--space-xl);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-glass);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      transition: all var(--transition-base);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: var(--space-md);
      text-decoration: none;
      color: inherit;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .scrap-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--highlight-purple), var(--accent));
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity var(--transition-base);
    }

    .scrap-card:hover {
      background: var(--bg-card-hover);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      border-color: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    }

    .scrap-card:hover::before {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .scrap-title {
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }

    .scrap-blurb {
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.7;
      flex: 1;
    }

    .scrap-link {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--accent);
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: opacity var(--transition-fast);
    }

    .scrap-link:hover {
      opacity: 0.75;
    }



    .substack-card {
      padding: var(--space-2xl);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-glass);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: var(--space-2xl);
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .substack-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6719, #ff9a5c);
    }

    .substack-icon {
      font-size: 3rem;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .substack-body h3 {
      margin-bottom: var(--space-sm);
    }

    .substack-body p {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.7;
      margin-bottom: var(--space-lg);
    }

    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .substack-card {
        flex-direction: column;
      }
    }
  </style>
pages.body_scripts:
<script>
    fetch('https://littlelearningmachine.substack.com/api/v1/posts/?limit=1')
      .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
      .then(function (posts) {
        if (!posts || !posts.length) return;
        var p = posts[0];
        document.getElementById('substack-latest-link').href = p.canonical_url;
        document.getElementById('substack-latest-title').textContent = p.title;
        if (p.subtitle) document.getElementById('substack-latest-subtitle').textContent = p.subtitle;
        var date = new Date(p.post_date).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
        document.getElementById('substack-latest-date').textContent = date;
        document.getElementById('substack-latest').style.display = '';
      })
      .catch(function () { });
  </script>

pages.title: Visualisations — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Interactive mathematical visualisations by Dr. Gerard McCaul  -  dynamical systems, Koopman operators, phase portraits, and Carleman lifting.
pages.og_description: Interactive mathematical visualisations: phase portraits, Koopman operators, Carleman lifting, and the dimensionality-nonlinearity trade.
pages.twitter_description: Interactive mathematical visualisations: dynamical systems, Koopman operators, Carleman lifting.
pages.head_extra:
<style>
    .viz-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr));
      gap: var(--space-xl);
    }

    .viz-card {
      padding: var(--space-xl);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-glass);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: var(--space-md);
      text-decoration: none;
      color: inherit;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: all var(--transition-base);
    }

    .viz-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5cacee, #60e0a0);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity var(--transition-base);
    }

    .viz-card:hover {
      background: var(--bg-card-hover);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      border-color: rgba(92, 172, 238, 0.25);
    }

    .viz-card:hover::before {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .viz-icon {
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .viz-title {
      font-size: 1.0rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      line-height: 1.4;
    }

    .viz-desc {
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.75;
      flex: 1;
    }

    .viz-footer {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: var(--space-md);
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .viz-series {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.07em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      opacity: 0.75;
    }

    .viz-open {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 5px;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #5cacee;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: opacity var(--transition-fast);
    }

    .viz-open:hover {
      opacity: 0.75;
    }

    .viz-tag {
      display: inline-block;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.07em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      background: rgba(92, 172, 238, 0.1);
      color: #5cacee;
      border: 1px solid rgba(92, 172, 238, 0.2);
    }

    .series-intro {
      padding: var(--space-xl);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-glass);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      border-left: 3px solid #5cacee;
      margin-bottom: var(--space-2xl);
    }

    .series-intro h3 {
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: var(--space-sm);
    }

    .series-intro p {
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.75;
    }

    .series-intro a {
      color: #5cacee;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    .series-intro a:hover {
      text-decoration: underline;
    }
  </style>

pages.title: Synthetics — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Synthetics: Statistical Lawhood Under Finite Description. A master guide and living experiment in agentic orchestration.

pages.twitter_description: Synthetics: Statistical Lawhood Under Finite Description. A master guide and living experiment in agentic orchestration.
